result:
Confirmed. Here's the full classification of all 10 allocation sites in `src/t_string.c`:

## (a) Locally freed via `decrRefCount` in the same function

| Line | Call | Function | Detail |
|---|---|---|---|
| 197 | `createStringObjectFromLongLong(milliseconds)` | `setGenericCommand` (SET expire rewrite) | Used as `milliseconds_obj` in `rewriteClientCommandArgument`/`rewriteClientCommandVector`, then `decrRefCount(milliseconds_obj)` at line 207. |
| 541 | `createStringObjectFromLongLong(milliseconds)` | `expireGenericCommand`-like path (GETEX) | Used in `rewriteClientCommandVector` at 542, freed at line 543. |
| 891 | `createStringObjectFromLongLong(milliseconds)` | `msetCommand`/`msetnxCommand`-style batch SET | Used in `rewriteClientCommandArgument` calls at 892-893, freed at line 894. |
| 1345 | `createStringObjectFromLongLong(args.expire_ms)` | `incrDecrGenericCommand` (INCREX-style, expire-set branch) | Used in `rewriteClientCommandVector` at 1346, freed at line 1347. |
| 1439 | `createStringObject("",0)` (fallback when `obja` doesn't exist) | `lcsCommand` | Falls through to `cleanup:` label, freed at line 1629 (`if (obja) decrRefCount(obja);`). |
| 1440 | `createStringObject("",0)` (fallback when `objb` doesn't exist) | `lcsCommand` | Falls through to `cleanup:` label, freed at line 1630 (`if (objb) decrRefCount(objb);`). |

## (b) Ownership transferred (no local `decrRefCount`)

| Line | Call | Function | Detail |
|---|---|---|---|
| 926 | `createStringObjectFromLongLongForValue(value)` | `incrDecrCommand` | Assigned to `new`; handed to the DB via `dbReplaceValueWithLink`/`dbAddByLink` (927-932) — ownership passes to the keyspace, never freed locally. |
| 983 | `createStringObjectFromLongDouble(value,1)` | `incrbyfloatCommand` | Assigned to `new`; handed to DB via `dbReplaceValueWithLink`/`dbAddByLink` (984-987), then also passed to `addReplyBulk`/`rewriteClientCommandArgument` — but never locally decref'd; DB owns it. |
| 1323 | `createStringObjectFromLongDouble(value_ld, 1)` | `incrDecrGenericCommand` (byfloat branch) | Assigned to `new`; handed to DB via `dbReplaceValueWithLink`/`dbAddByLink` (1326-1329). |
| 1325 | `createStringObjectFromLongLongForValue(value_ll)` | `incrDecrGenericCommand` (integer branch) | Same as above — assigned to `new`, handed to DB via `dbReplaceValueWithLink`/`dbAddByLink`. |

**Summary:** 6 of the 10 sites are locally freed (all are `createStringObjectFromLongLong`/`createStringObject` calls used only transiently to rewrite the replicated command, e.g. millisecond-timestamp args or LCS empty-string placeholders). The other 4 (`createStringObjectFromLongLongForValue` ×2, `createStringObjectFromLongDouble` ×2) are the actual new key values for INCR/DECR/INCRBYFLOAT/INCREX-style commands, and their ownership is transferred into the database via `dbReplaceValueWithLink`/`dbAddByLink` — no local `decrRefCount` exists for them.
